name: Mexican Chili Dip
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Tomatoes, Peeled, Seeded and Chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium bowl, mix together mayonnaise, sour cream, soup mix, chili powder, and cumin until smooth.
2. Stir in the remaining ingredients except chives; mix well.
3. Cover and refrigerate for at least 2 hours to blend flavors.
4. Present in a pottery bowl; garnish with chopped chives.
